body.title: [hold] Class-shim leases reusable instance numbers over a per-class free-list (live object + PID fallback)
body.intention: I intend that a class-shim assigns each instance a reusable number from a per-class free-list, so instance_name numbers reuse freed slots and never collide.
body.description:
**Blocked on: T-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop** (the shim must be the persistent front-door that holds the free-list). Wires the leasing D-worker-instance-identity deferred.

**What to build:** a per-class free-list held in the class-shim: slot INDEX = instance number, slot VALUE = the live instance object (self), with a PID persisted per instance for crash-recovery.
- ALLOCATE: return the first index whose slot is None; else append a new slot. Caller passes self -> stored at that index (no collision).
- RELEASE: shim sets the slot to None; if it was the LAST slot, trim it.
- REBUILD after a front-door restart: reconstruct from persisted PIDs, liveness-checking each (dead PID = free slot).
- DATA DIRS: the leases file + class-shim state live in ~/.unseen_university/devices/<CLASSNAME>/ (full name, e.g. devices/DickSimnel/); each instance's state+logging lives in ~/.unseen_university/devices/<ABBREV>.<NUMBER>/ (e.g. devices/DS.0/).
- The instance asks the shim for its number during __init__ (D-worker-instance-identity); instance_number stops defaulting to 0 and becomes the leased value.

**Completion criteria:** allocating 3 instances yields DS.0/DS.1/DS.2; releasing DS.1 then allocating again REUSES slot 1 (DS.1); releasing the tail trims the list; a rebuild from PID files after dropping the in-memory list reconstructs the same taken/free set.

**Test plan (real red->green):** unit — drive allocate/release/allocate on a class-shim, assert reuse of the freed index and tail-trim; simulate a front-door restart (drop in-memory list, keep PID files) and assert rebuild matches liveness. Red before the free-list exists; green after.

**Validation (runtime):** devices/DickSimnel/ holds the leases file; a second live DS instance logs under devices/DS.1/; instance_name stays stable across a wake/sleep cycle. Observable via the leases file contents + per-instance folders.

**Logging:** log.info('lease: assigned %s to <class>' , instance_name) on allocate; log.info('lease: released %s', instance_name) on release, at the shim boundary.

**Observable via:** log.info('lease: assigned DS.1') + the appearance of ~/.unseen_university/devices/DS.1/.

**Affected files (indicative):** unseen_university/devices/<worker>/shim.py + BaseShim (the free-list), unseen_university/capabilities/identity.py (instance_number from lease), the class-shim data dir.

**Rollback:** git revert — falls back to instance_number defaulting to 0 (single foreground). No data migration.

**audit-emphasis:** needs-deep-smell (concurrency on the free-list; the number-leak the consequence ticket watches).

**Scope boundary:** the leasing free-list + data dirs + instance_number-from-lease. Pool cap/wipe (T-worker-pool-semantics) and idle-sleep (T-worker-idle-sleep-bus-ask) are separate.
